meaning: n.寓言,神话,谎言vi.讲故事,编寓言,煞有其事地讲述
examples: The old fable continues to echo down the centuries.
The fable is on the next page.
The fable is given on the next page.
In other words, the mid-life crisis is a fable - but we all love fables, don't we?
This compact crystallization of fable and reality is as ample as a full-length feature.
